case_title: JINGYUN COFFEY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-12-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-23-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-23-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-03-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COST, EXPENSES, AND ATTORNEY'S FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100111609)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COFFEY, JINGYUN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A.K.A CCSF DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-12-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-12-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-20-2020
